biological_activities.mic_unit: mµmoles per mg (dry weight) of cells

mechanism_of_action: Antimycin A inhibits metabolic reduction of cytochrome c. Its bactericidal action also involves hindering plasma-membrane functions by associating with the lipid-rich plasma membrane, occluding reactive sites for nutrilite uptake and transport. At higher concentrations, it causes lesions in the osmotic barrier, leading to outflow of small molecules and protoplast lysis, similar to cationic detergents or polymyxin.
